'''rakobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okolehao|okolehao]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okolehao|okolehao]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rakobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rækebeth || rækebej || rækebesh || rækebe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rakokoboth || rakokoboj || rakokobosh || rakokobo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rakoboth || rakoboj || rakobosh || rakobo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rakofbofth || rakofbofj || rakofbofsh || rakofbof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rakobotho || rakobojo || rakobosho || rakoboko
|-
| [[Patient]] || rakoboth || rakoboj || rakobosh || rakobo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rakobothol || rakobojol || rakoboshol || rakobokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rakoboothotho || rakoboojojo || rakobooshosho || rakobooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || rakobothon || rakobojon || rakoboshon || rakobokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rakobothooro || rakobojooro || rakoboshooro || rakobokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
